decisions.summary: provider_failure mode is not applicable: preflight has zero external provider, API, HTTP, or network dependency by contract
decisions.reason: Non-applicability: RPA-CONTRACT-003 requires detection to be a pure function of on-disk state, and the network_runtime review verified the full transitive dependency chain contains no provider/API/HTTP/network call sites (only local git via execFile on the fix path). There is no external provider surface whose failure this story could exercise; the failure modes this story does own (recipe exceptions, unparseable inputs, schema mismatches) are covered by executable unit evidence.

decisions.summary: Followup: tighten the generic-token-clause-binding e2e regex to next_command only (currently accepts planned too)
decisions.reason: e2e_ux round-4 LOW finding assertion-precision: the alternation next_command|planned is looser than the recipe's fixed action label; tightening deferred to avoid re-staling the review matrix for a cosmetic regex change with no false-pass risk today.

decisions.summary: Followup: assert non-dry-run applied-state CLI text (auto_fixed wording) in a future change; row format is a shared code path so risk is low
decisions.reason: e2e_ux round-2 LOW finding rpa-cli-applied-state-still-unasserted: the dry-run e2e fixes the heading and row format, but the applied action_taken wording on non-dry-run runs is not asserted on the CLI text surface. Deferred as followup because the rendering row format is a shared code path already asserted in dry-run form.

decisions.summary: 2 commits on this branch (feat: recipe registry + wiring; docs: threat_model diagram + responsibility-authority registration) are both scoped to story-vibepro-recipe-preflight-autopilot; no unrelated Story or repo-control changes are mixed in
decisions.reason: Commit 1 implements the preflight registry and pr-manager.js wiring with tests; commit 2 adds the threat_model diagram required by gate:design_diagrams and registers src/recipe-preflight.js in responsibility-authority.json required by gate:responsibility_authority. Both are strictly part of closing out this single story; git diff origin/main..HEAD touches only src/recipe-preflight.js, src/pr-manager.js, test/recipe-preflight.test.js, test/e2e/story-vibepro-recipe-preflight-autopilot-main.spec.js, test/vibepro-cli.test.js, responsibility-authority.json, and this story's own docs (story/architecture/spec).

decisions.summary: Bundled scope: recipe registry module + pr-manager wiring + docs (architecture/spec/story) + unit + e2e tests are one coherent feature; splitting would leave the wiring commit untestable without its registry or vice versa
decisions.reason: The 8 changed files (src/recipe-preflight.js, src/pr-manager.js wiring, test/recipe-preflight.test.js, test/e2e/story-vibepro-recipe-preflight-autopilot-main.spec.js, test/vibepro-cli.test.js, and the story/architecture/spec docs) implement a single preflight phase; the registry module has no caller without the pr-manager.js wiring, and the wiring has no behavior without the registry, so a split PR would ship a non-functional half in each part. No unrelated changes are bundled in.

decisions.summary: Scope reviewability accepted: this PR is one cohesive decision boundary, the recipe preflight registry for pr autopilot. Changed files are src/recipe-preflight.js (new module), a single wiring point plus report section in src/pr-manager.js, the focused test suite test/recipe-preflight.test.js, one assertion block in test/vibepro-cli.test.js, and the story/spec doc updates for the same story. One reviewer can read it as a single judgment.
decisions.reason: Diff is 6 files all bound to story-vibepro-recipe-preflight-autopilot; scope.status=reviewable from pr prepare and the blast radius is limited to the autopilot entry path (preflight runs strictly before existing phases and never mutates gate results per RPA-CONTRACT-001). No split is warranted.
